title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Berger Paints
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
